cash_pressure: reduced after GLD and NVDA partial sales
leverage_risk: GGLL remains the principal leveraged ETF exposure
weak_position_drag: reduced through prior cleanup and current core-risk reductions
bot_strategy_risk: not applicable to U.S. cost basis
rule_compliance: partial sales were reconciled against order records and remaining quantities
redeployment_readiness: cash improved, but new buying remains prohibited
key_findings: Broker-displayed remaining cost basis may change after partial sales.
A changed remaining cost basis must not be interpreted as a new purchase or unrecorded execution.
Cockpit consumers should use order writeback plus before/after quantity for reconciliation.
recommended_next_actions: Label post-sale cost basis as broker-calculated remaining-position metadata.
Keep execution history and remaining cost basis as separate fields.
